hub_subtitle: Medical English to welcome guests and present with confidence

lesson.menu_title: Numbers, Dates and Times at Work
lesson.menu_desc: Schedule meetings: numbers, the time, dates and at / on / in -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 4 -- Numbers, Dates and Times at Work
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Graziele Dias | Aula 4 -- Numbers, Dates and Times

listenings.text: Hi Graziele, this is Dr. Carter. I am calling about our meeting. The meeting is on Monday, the third of June, at ten o'clock in the morning. Please come to the meeting room on the second floor. The meeting is one hour. See you on Monday. Thank you.

Hello, this is your calendar reminder. You have three appointments this week. On Tuesday, at nine o'clock, the team meeting. On Wednesday, at half past two, a call with the doctors. On Friday, at four o'clock, the training. Please check your schedule. Have a good week.

extra_audio.text: Graziele opens her calendar. She finds a free hour on Monday. She sends a message to Dr. Carter. She writes the appointment at half past two. She confirms the meeting in the meeting room.
